---
title: "Public API Reference"
---

<div class="claim-boundary-strip">
<span class="claim-boundary-label">Claim boundary</span>
<span class="claim-boundary-badge claim-boundary-executable">generated reference</span>
<span class="claim-boundary-badge claim-boundary-proved">Lean imports compile</span>
<span class="claim-boundary-badge claim-boundary-speculative">research modules may change</span>
</div>

The public API reference is generated from the stable Python facades, Lean
facade imports, and Rust crate root:

- [Generated Public API Reference](https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/docs/generated/PUBLIC_API_REFERENCE.md)
- Source generator: `scripts/generate_public_api_docs.py`

Stable entry points:

- Python: `circle_math.core`, `circle_math.contracts`, `circle_math.ai_contracts`
- Lean: `Circle.Core`, `Circle.Applications.Public`, `Circle.Contracts`
- Rust: `circle-prime`

Regenerate locally:

```bash
make public-api-docs
```

For copy-paste usage examples, start with [Use This As A Library](use_as_library.qmd).

<script type="module" src="widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
